zh.Tunstall, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾彤絲朵
zh.Cantsfield, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾坎特斯費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Tunstall II於大約1268年出生在英國藍卡爾彤絲朵時，他的父親John de Tunstall32歲，母親Maud17歲。他於大約1307年與Gundreda結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1297年登記服兵役。他去世於1315年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾彤絲朵享年48歲。

zh-hans.Tunstall, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾彤絲朵
zh-hans.Cantsfield, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾坎特斯費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Tunstall II于大约1268年出生在英国藍卡爾彤絲朵时，他的父亲John de Tunstall32岁，母亲Maud17岁。他于大约1307年与Gundreda结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1297年登记服兵役。他去世于1315年在英国英格兰藍卡爾彤絲朵享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tunstall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): habitational name from any of various places called with Old English tūn-stall ‘site of a farm, farmstead’, notably Tunstall (Lancashire) and one or more of many Staffordshire places (Tunstall near Stoke on Trent, Tunstall near Adbaston, and four places called Dunstall), but also Tunstall Farm in Mountfield (Sussex) and possibly also Tunstall (Durham, Kent, Norfolk, Shropshire, Suffolk, east and North Yorkshire), and Dunstall (Lincolnshire).

variants.name: Tunstill
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Tunstall  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When John Tunstall II was born about 1268, in Tunstall, Lancashire, England, his father, John de Tunstall, was 32 and his mother, Maud, was 17. He married Gundreda about 1307. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He registered for military service in 1297. He died in 1315, in Tunstall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Tunstall II est né environ 1268, à Tunstall, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, John de Tunstall, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Maud, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Gundreda environ 1307. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1297. Il est décédé en 1315, à Tunstall, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Tunstall II um 1268 in Tunstall, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Tunstall 32 und seine Mutter Maud 17. Er hat um 1307 Gundreda geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er hat sich 1297 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1315 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Tunstall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Tunstall II è nato il circa 1268 nel Tunstall, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, John de Tunstall, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Maud, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Gundreda circa 1307. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1297. Morì nel 1315, nel Tunstall, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Tunstall IIが約1268年にイギリスランカシュアイアトゥンスタルで生まれた時，父John de Tunstallは32歳，母Maudは17歳であった。約1307年にGundredaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1297年に兵役登録をした。彼は1315年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアトゥンスタルで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Tunstall II(이)가 대략 1268년 영국 랭카실르 툰스탤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Tunstall(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1307년 Gundreda(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1297년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1315년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 툰스탤에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Tunstall, Lancashire, England: Tunstall, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Tunstall II nasceu aproximadamente 1268, em Tunstall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Tunstall, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Maud, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Gundreda aproximadamente 1307. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1297. Ele faleceu em 1315, em Tunstall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Tunstall II родился около 1268 г. в местности тунсталл, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Tunstall было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Maud, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Gundreda около 1307 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. В 1297 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1315 г. в местности тунсталл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.

sm.from 1297 to 1307: mai le 1297 e o'o I le 1307

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Tunstall II nació aproximadamente 1268, en Tunstall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Tunstall, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Maud, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Gundreda aproximadamente 1307. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1297. Murió en 1315, en Tunstall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años.
